name: unsafe-and-opaque.svg
source: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" viewBox="0 0 100 100" onload="alert(1)"><script>alert('no')</script><style>@import url(https://evil.example/x.css); path { fill: red; }</style><foreignObject><iframe src="https://evil.example"></iframe></foreignObject><defs><linearGradient id="gradient"><stop offset="0" stop-color="#fff"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#000"/></linearGradient></defs><image id="external-image" href="https://evil.example/image.png" width="20" height="20"/><path id="gradient-path" d="M0 0 L50 0 L50 50 Z" fill="url(#gradient)" onclick="alert(2)"/><path id="safe-path" d="M60 60 L90 90" fill="none" stroke="#00ff00"/></svg>
